creator: tps@vr-web.de
text:
This seems to be related to db41 -> db48 migration. After removing all ports depending on db41, then recompiling them with db48 libs installed made those compile errors vanish.

Not sure which of the various libraries it was, but on all tested system it was the same. Now gcc47, gcc48, gcc49, and gcc5 compile on FreeBSD {8,9,10}-STABLE and 11-CURRENT.

Since db48 doesn't depend on or isn't required by anything gcc{47..49,5} depends on it is not obvious that recompiling all those packages depending on db41 after moving to db48 will have side effects of solving an error condition compiling gcc{47..49,5}.
